name: mid-blurred-ownership
cv:
Iris Halloran
Software Engineer

Plumb & Co (2021-present) - Software Engineer
- Worked on the payments reconciliation service (Java/Spring), processing ~2M transactions/day.
- Part of the team that cut nightly batch runtime from 3 hours to 40 minutes.
- Contributed to the migration off a monolith into three services.

Vellum Health (2019-2021) - Software Engineer
- Built and maintained the appointment-scheduling API.

Education: BSc Computing, 2019.

Skills: Java, Spring, PostgreSQL, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes.
posting: Software Engineer (mid-level), Plumb & Co. Own features in our payments platform, drive them from design to production, and take part in on-call. We look for initiative, sound judgment under ambiguity, and the ability to navigate disagreement constructively. Stack: Java/Spring, Kafka, PostgreSQL. 3-5 years.
profile: Solid mid-level engineer who was genuinely in the work, but instinctively narrates in the first-person plural: 'we decided', 'we built', 'the team cut runtime'. Rarely says what she specifically owned or decided. Needs probing to separate her contribution from the team's. Otherwise candid and detailed.
